handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260406 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
client req_quote {"req_id":"$req1","contract":{"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD","primary_exchange":"","local_symbol":""},"snapshot":false,"generic_ticks":[]}
server tick_price {"req_id":"$req1","field":4,"price":"250.00"}
server api_error {"req_id":0,"code":1100,"message":"Connectivity between IB and TWS has been lost"}
server api_error {"req_id":0,"code":1102,"message":"Connectivity between IB and TWS has been restored - data maintained"}
server tick_price {"req_id":"$req1","field":4,"price":"251.00"}
client cancel_quote {"req_id":"$req1"}
disconnect
